mapper.sql: r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS title, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.cook_time AS cookTime, ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT rv.review_id) AS reviewCount

where.if: AND ( r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM recipe_ingredient ri2 WHERE ri2.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND ri2.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
AND r.cook_time IS NOT NULL AND r.cook_time <= #{maxCookTime}

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN review rv ON rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id
GROUP BY r.recipe_id, r.title, r.image_url, r.cook_time, r.view_count, r.created_at
ORDER BY reviewCount DESC, r.view_count DESC ORDER BY avgRating DESC, reviewCount DESC ORDER BY (r.cook_time IS NULL), r.cook_time ASC ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.recipe_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, title FROM recipe WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY view_count DESC, recipe_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN review rv ON rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id GROUP BY r.recipe_id, r.title, r.image_url, r.cook_time, r.view_count, r.created_at ORDER BY reviewCount DESC, avgRating DESC, r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS title, r.summary AS description, r.cook_time AS cookTime, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT rv.review_id) AS reviewCount, r.calories AS calories, r.carbs AS carbs, r.protein AS protein, r.fat AS fat, r.sodium AS sodium FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN review rv ON rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id WHERE r.recipe_id = #{recipeId} GROUP BY r.recipe_id, r.title, r.summary, r.cook_time, r.image_url, r.calories, r.carbs, r.protein, r.fat, r.sodium
SELECT name, qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ingredient_id) AS sortOrder FROM recipe_ingredient WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY ingredient_id
SELECT step_number AS stepNumber, description, image_url AS imageUrl FROM recipe_step WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_number
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId})
